content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity Project Template to Solve Debugging
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to build professional-grade software as a student developer.
content.answer_block: Debugging isn't a failure; it's a skill. By integrating the Antigravity project template with Claude Code, you transform error logs into actionable intelligence. This workflow automates root-cause analysis, allowing you to bypass manual troubleshooting and focus on building features that actually work for your portfolio.
content.intro:
The screen flickers. You’ve been staring at a terminal full of red text for three hours, and the logic that felt so elegant this morning now feels like a labyrinth of broken promises. You are at the threshold where most developers quit—the moment where the code stops working and the impostor syndrome starts screaming. But here is the secret: professional engineers don't 'fix' bugs; they engineer systems that make debugging trivial.

Today, we are bridging the gap between frustration and mastery. By adopting the Antigravity project template, you are not just writing code; you are building a resilient, self-documenting architecture. Paired with Claude Code, you gain an AI partner that understands your codebase as well as you do, turning every error into a learning milestone that proves your technical capability to future employers.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Environment
steps.description: Establish a standardized project structure that ensures every file has a clear purpose, reducing the cognitive load required to track down logic errors.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity template for a full-stack web application, ensuring strict modularity and clear separation of concerns.

steps.title: Inject Contextual Awareness
steps.description: Feed your project constraints and architectural goals into the AI so it understands the 'why' behind your code, not just the syntax.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure and create a context map that outlines the relationship between the API layer and the frontend state management.

steps.title: Automated Error Trace Analysis
steps.description: Instead of guessing, use Claude Code to parse your runtime errors against the Antigravity template's design patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the latest error trace in the console and identify if the issue violates any of the Antigravity template's design patterns or state management rules.

steps.title: Iterative Logic Refinement
steps.description: Apply targeted patches suggested by the AI to ensure the fix aligns with the project's long-term maintainability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose a refactor for the identified bug that maintains the modularity required by the Antigravity template without introducing technical debt.

steps.title: Verify Through Automated Testing
steps.description: Ensure your fix is robust by running the built-in testing suite included in your template.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of unit tests for the newly patched module to ensure no regressions were introduced into the core logic.

pro_tips: Treat your error logs as 'requirements documentation'—if a bug happens once, it's an accident; if it happens twice, build an automated test to catch it.
Always ask Claude Code to explain 'why' a fix was chosen before applying it; this is how you actually learn the underlying language concepts.
Use Antigravity's metadata tags to annotate your functions; this significantly improves the AI's ability to provide accurate suggestions.
Don't commit code until you've run the 'lint-check' command; clean code is easier to debug than messy code.
If you get stuck for more than 20 minutes, step away, clear your cache, and ask the AI to summarize the state of your project from scratch.
content.next_steps: Once your project is stable, push your code to GitHub, write a brief 'How I Solved This' README section, and share your repository with a peer for code review.
content.conversion_block: You now have the exact workflow used by senior engineers to ship production-ready applications. Stop fearing the terminal and start mastering the build process. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
